name: TuxBot: Semantic-Aware Online OS Tuning with Large Language Models
summary: arXiv:2605.15026v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Online OS tuning can improve long-running services, but existing controllers are poorly matched to live hosts. They treat scheduler, power,...
description: arXiv:2605.15026v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Online OS tuning can improve long-running services, but existing controllers are poorly matched to live hosts. They treat scheduler, power, memory, and I/O controls as black-box variables and optimize a scalar reward. This view ignores cross-knob policy structure, breaks down when application metrics are unavailable, and can send a runni...
author: Georgios Liargkovas, Mihir Nitin Joshi, Hubertus Franke, Kostis Kaffes
